$comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH for DEXI flight-controller parameters. Everything else is generated from this file: the .params downloads (tools/gen-params.mjs), the px4-web-configurator UI, and droneblocks-mavlink-tool provisioning. Edit here, regenerate, never edit a .params by hand.
name: DEXI-3

boardDefaults.$comment: Params true of every DEXI-3 with this board — written as the baseline before a profile is applied.

base-comms.doc: Flow-sensor MAVLink link + CRSF RC pad. True of BOTH kits — this is what makes flow position-hold and manual RC flight work, and nothing more.

params.name: MAV_2_CONFIG
params.note: MAVLink instance on TELEM3 — receives UP-T201 optical flow

params.name: RC_CRSF_PRT_CFG
params.note: CRSF auto-detected on the RC pad — standalone CRSF driver must stay off

companion-comms.doc: Developer Kit only: the Pi companion links — ROS 2 over uXRCE-DDS and MAVLink-over-WiFi via mavlink-router. A Flight Kit has no companion to talk to.

params.name: MAV_0_CONFIG
params.note: mavlink-router on TELEM1 → MAVLink-over-WiFi (QGC / desktop over the Pi)

rc.doc: Pilot controls. Same transmitter layout on every DEXI-3: CH5 arm, CH6 Stabilized/Altitude/Position, CH8 kill. Mode slots are 1/4/6 because that is where a 3-position switch lands (PX4 RCUpdateTest.cpp).

params.name: RC_INPUT_PROTO
params.note: CRSF — pinned so the driver never auto-latches a wrong protocol

params.name: COM_ARM_SWISBTN
params.note: CH5 is a 2-position switch, not a momentary button

tune.doc: Validated DEXI-3 flight tune (two units, 2026-06-17). Effective rate gain = K * P, so the K lines ARE part of the tune — dropping them transfers the wrong gain.

params.name: SENS_BOARD_ROT
params.note: FC mounted Yaw 45 in the DEXI-3 frame

params.name: MC_AIRMODE
params.note: OFF — fixes motor jitter on arm

params.name: MC_YAWRATE_D
params.note: PX4 default — asserted so a stale autotuned D-term is cleared

indoor-flow-nav.doc: GPS-denied indoor navigation: optical flow + laser range, mag off (gyro yaw), baro smoothing on.

indoor-limits.doc: Indoor / classroom speed cap. Starter default, not hardware-validated — review before relying on it in the field.

apriltag-nav.doc: External-vision pose (AprilTag / VIO) fused over flow + range. REQUIRES a companion publishing VISION_POSITION_ESTIMATE.

outdoor-gps-nav.doc: GPS + external compass outdoors. PROPOSED — needs a GPS+compass module fitted; not flight-validated.

acro-rates.doc: ACRO max rates for flips/rolls. PX4 defaults (300/300/100) feel sluggish.

profiles.name: DEXI Indoor (Flow Only)
profiles.description: GPS-denied indoor flight from optical flow + laser range. No external pose source needed — flies anywhere with floor texture. This is the shipping default.
details: Horizontal: optical flow (EKF2_OF_CTRL = 1), external vision OFF (EKF2_EV_CTRL = 0)
Height: laser range as reference (EKF2_HGT_REF = 2, EKF2_RNG_CTRL = 2) + baro smoothing (EKF2_BARO_CTRL = 1)
Heading: gyro-only (EKF2_MAG_TYPE = 5) — the onboard mag glitches indoors
Arms without GPS (EKF2_GPS_CTRL = 0, COM_ARM_WO_GPS = 1)
Indoor speed cap (MPC_XY_VEL_MAX = 4 m/s)

profiles.name: DEXI Indoor (AprilTags)
profiles.description: Adds an external-vision pose source (AprilTag or VIO) for drift-free horizontal position and yaw. Requires a companion node publishing VISION_POSITION_ESTIMATE to PX4.
details: Navigation: fuse external vision pos + vel + yaw (EKF2_EV_CTRL = 15) over flow + range
REQUIRES an EV odometry source actively publishing (apriltag / VIO companion)
EV noise: EKF2_EVP/EVV/EVA_NOISE = 0.1; tune EKF2_EV_DELAY to your pipeline latency
Indoor speed cap (MPC_XY_VEL_MAX = 4 m/s)

profiles.name: DEXI Indoor (UWB)
profiles.description: Ultra-wideband positioning (Bitcraze Loco / DW3000, TDoA) for drift-free absolute position without cameras or floor texture. Planned — params land here once the UWB→PX4 bridge is validated.
details: Navigation: anchor-based UWB ranging fed to PX4 (likely via the EV pipeline, or as a fake-GPS local position)
Final param set TBD pending bench validation of the TDoA solver on the companion
Architecture note: when ready this is just sections[] here — no code changes

profiles.name: DEXI Outdoor (GPS)
profiles.description: GPS + external-compass outdoor flight. Requires a GPS+compass module on the airframe. Proposed param set — documented here, not yet flight-validated (kept disabled until then).
details: Horizontal + height: GPS (EKF2_GPS_CTRL = 7), require GPS to arm (COM_ARM_WO_GPS = 0)
Height reference: GPS (EKF2_HGT_REF = 1)
Heading: magnetometer back ON (EKF2_MAG_TYPE = 0) — the external mag on the GPS mast is clean outdoors
Indoor sensors off: optical flow (EKF2_OF_CTRL = 0), external vision (EKF2_EV_CTRL = 0)
Needs the GPS+compass hardware — applying this without it will leave the EKF without its aiding source

profiles.name: DEXI-3 Flight Kit — Complete Setup
profiles.description: The one file to send a Flight Kit (Build / Fly). Everything a flow position-hold drone flown by radio needs: flow-sensor link + RC + validated flight tune + indoor flow navigation. No companion computer.
details: Comms: optical-flow MAVLink link on TELEM3 + CRSF RC pad
RC: CH5 arm/disarm, CH6 Stabilized/Altitude/Position, CH8 kill
Tune: the validated DEXI-3 rate/attitude gains (airmode off, board Yaw-45)
Navigation: indoor flow position hold (EKF2_EV_CTRL = 0, flow + range)
Load this one file in QGC and the drone is ready to fly — no second file

profiles.name: DEXI-3 Developer Kit — Complete Setup
profiles.description: The one file to send a Developer Kit (Build / Fly / Code). Everything in the Flight Kit PLUS the Pi companion links — ROS2 over uXRCE-DDS and MAVLink-over-WiFi via mavlink-router.
details: Comms: flow + RC baseline PLUS companion links (uXRCE-DDS on TELEM2, mavlink-router on TELEM1)
RC: CH5 arm/disarm, CH6 Stabilized/Altitude/Position, CH8 kill
Tune: the validated DEXI-3 rate/attitude gains
Navigation: indoor flow position hold
Requires the Pi companion running the DEXI-OS image for the ROS2 / WiFi links
One file — no separate comms file needed

profiles.name: DEXI-3 Developer Comms (add-on)
profiles.description: Add-on: just the Pi companion links (ROS2 + MAVLink-over-WiFi). Use this to upgrade a drone that already has the Flight Kit setup — leaves tune and navigation untouched.
details: ROS2: uXRCE-DDS on TELEM2 (UXRCE_DDS_CFG = 102, SER_TEL2_BAUD = 921600)
MAVLink-over-WiFi: mavlink-router on TELEM1 (MAV_0_CONFIG = 101, SER_TEL1_BAUD = 500000)
Does NOT touch flight tune or navigation — pure companion-link overlay

profiles.name: DEXI-3 ACRO rates
profiles.description: ADDITIVE — writes ONLY the ACRO max rates for snappy flips/rolls. Touches nothing else: no comms/EKF/airframe params, no board defaults, no reboot. Layers on top of whatever profile you already run.
details: Roll/pitch max rate 720°/s, yaw 400°/s (the PX4 300/300/100 defaults feel sluggish)
Writes only MC_ACRO_R_MAX / MC_ACRO_P_MAX / MC_ACRO_Y_MAX, then force-saves
Airmode is separate — if flips still stall at low throttle, check MC_AIRMODE = 1
